name: open-icon-monorepo
description: Monorepo containing open-icon-transform, open-icon-svg, and vite-plugin-open-icon.

scripts.build: npm run build:transform && npm run build:svg && npm run build:vite-plugin && npm run build:api && npm run build:site
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:transform && npm run typecheck:svg && npm run typecheck:vite-plugin && npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:site
scripts.test: npm run test:transform && npm run test:svg && npm run test:vite-plugin && npm run test:api && npm run test:site
scripts.clean: npm --workspace open-icon-transform run clean && npm --workspace open-icon-svg run clean && npm --workspace vite-plugin-open-icon run clean && npm --workspace open-icon-api run clean && npm --workspace open-icon-org run clean
